title: Add MCP XAA/IdP OAuth login flow
description: CC implements RFC 8693 token-exchange + RFC 7523 JWT-bearer grant (xaa.ts:1-511, xaaIdpLogin.ts:1-487) for headless enterprise SSO (Cross-App Access / SEP-990). OC has no OAuth token management of any kind. Required: implement PRM discovery (RFC 9728), AS metadata fetch (RFC 8414), token-exchange call, JWT-bearer grant, and token caching.
